context: Agent must identify all testability blockers in a service with four distinct untestable constructs and produce a structured written analysis

checklist.name: Concrete DB instantiation identified
checklist.description: analysis.md includes a blocker entry for `new Pool(...)` or the PostgreSQL connection being instantiated inside the class

checklist.name: Concrete Stripe instantiation identified
checklist.description: analysis.md includes a blocker entry for `new Stripe(...)` being instantiated inside the class

checklist.name: Side effect: email sending identified
checklist.description: analysis.md includes a blocker entry for the direct call to `sendEmail` as a hard-coded side effect

checklist.name: Side effect: filesystem write identified
checklist.description: analysis.md includes a blocker entry for `fs.writeFileSync` as a hard-coded side effect

checklist.name: Correct structured format used
checklist.description: Each blocker uses the three-line format: 'Testability blocker: / Problem: / Refactor:'

checklist.name: Refactor recommendation names interface injection
checklist.description: At least two of the Refactor lines recommend injecting an interface or abstract type rather than just 'use a mock'
